{{Quote|Skutch! Keep an eye on this one.|Meeka Reen, regarding Luke Skywalker|<ref name="dkd" />}}
'''Skutch''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who fought as one of [[Meeka Reen]]'s anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Meeka Reen's pirates|pirates-turned-guerrillas]] on [[Jerne]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Skutch was present when Reen's group freed important [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] captives [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] from the clutches of Imperial [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Ryko Vant]]—it was Skutch who later discovered that Vant had left a [[Homing beacon/Legends|tracking device]] on Skywalker's [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], leading to conflict between the Rebels and Reen's guerrillas. Skutch was later [[Death/Legends|killed]] with the rest of Reen's group, attempting to blow open a bunker supposedly holding a relic known as the "[[Eternity Crystal]]."<ref name="dkd" />

==Appearances==
